title: schmaltzia costaricensis
intro: Schmaltzia costaricensis is a species of plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the Cost Rican Rue or Schmaltzia tree. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of Schmaltzia costaricensis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
